objective: Map every capability of the Windows Calculator app so workers can perform any calculation.
constraints: Be nondestructive; do not change system settings
Prefer stable UI selectors; avoid OCR unless necessary

navigation.mode_switching: Use navigation menu to switch modes; capture selectors for each mode entry

stability_notes: Capture selectors for: window, nav menu, mode buttons, keypad buttons, display, memory list, history pane, converter category selector.
Record any dynamic IDs; prefer role/name-based selectors.

expected_outputs_detail.skill_map: One skill per operation family with pre/postconditions and selectors
expected_outputs_detail.selectors: Stable selectors for all buttons, displays, menus
expected_outputs_detail.modes: List of modes and how to enter/exit each
expected_outputs_detail.operations_coverage: List of operations covered and verified
